issues.detail: The skill file only provides happy path examples and does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Installation uses wget to fetch a GPG key from an official source without verifying a checksum.

scenarios.name: Web service job with canary deploys and autoscaling
scenarios.rationale: Treatment supplies the full HCL with update{canary=1, auto_revert=true}, service{provider="consul"} health checks, and a scaling policy with target-value strategy against Prometheus, while the baseline omits canary updates, the consul provider, and autoscaling entirely.

scenarios.name: Nightly batch backup with Vault secrets
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses periodic{crons=[...], prohibit_overlap=true, time_zone="UTC"} with a Vault template rendering database/creds/backup into env vars, while the baseline uses the deprecated cron field, hardcodes the password, and misses overlap and timezone controls.
